title: Are Discounts for New Customers Worth It?
excerpt: Is it more profitable to acquire new customers or retain existing ones? Discover why new-customer-only discounts may hurt your bottom line and learn data-driven strategies for customer retention vs acquisition campaigns.

title: Bad Boys' CX Ultimate Guide
excerpt: Discover why understanding customer needs is vital for a successful CX programme. Enhance your approach with our ultimate guide.

title: Building Emotional Bonds with Customers: Beyond Generic Advice to True Personalisation
excerpt: How do we build a bond with our customers? This is not a small question. While generic advice from keynote speakers may be valid, it often doesn't apply to your particular case. The answer lies in personalisation—creating bonds one customer at a time, one experience at a time.

title: Customer Service Segmentation: A Smarter Way to Allocate Resources
excerpt: Discover how customer service segmentation improves resource allocation in call centres. Learn to segment customers by knowledge level and urgency to optimize service efficiency, reduce handling times, and improve customer satisfaction.

title: CX Origins: The Ancient Roots of Customer Experience: A 4,000-Year Journey
excerpt: Discover the fascinating origins of customer experience, from ancient Babylonian complaints to modern CX practices, and see how customer service has evolved over 4,000 years.

title: Domain Squatting: When Your Perfect .com Is Held Hostage
excerpt: Your dream .com is owned by a squatter demanding £20k+? You're not alone. Why paying the ransom is outdated thinking — and how to launch stronger without it.

title: Exit, Voice, and Loyalty: The Theory That Explains Why Your Customers Don’t Complain (They Just Leave)
excerpt: Discover why many dissatisfied customers and employees never complain — they simply leave. In this article, we explore Albert O. Hirschman’s Exit, Voice, and Loyalty theory and how it combines with Segmentor to reveal hidden insights into customer behaviour, silent churn, and the true nature of voice in CX and EX programmes.

title: Feedback Bias: Navigating the Complexities of Honest Insights
excerpt: Explore how feedback bias impacts innovation in exclusive services and personal relationships, hindering business growth.

title: How Segmentor.app Was Born: A Two-Year Journey from Hotel Room Sketch to Reality
excerpt: Discover the story behind Segmentor.app, a two-year journey from a hotel room sketch to a powerful Apostles Model builder. Learn how customer segmentation, data privacy, and ethical web development principles shaped this innovative CX tool.

title: Improving CX by listening to customers beyond surveys
excerpt: Discover why a deeper approach to customer insights is essential for enhancing CX beyond just surveys.

title: Is the Customer Always Right? Navigating the 'Wrong Customer' Dilemma
excerpt: Explore the 'wrong customer' dilemma in customer experience strategy. Discover why customer segmentation matters, how to prevent difficult customer relationships, and strategies for managing unprofitable customers while maintaining customer centricity.

title: Why an NPS® of 95 Is a Red Flag, Not a Trophy
excerpt: An NPS® of 95 sounds impressive, but it's technically dubious and often a sign of a gamed system rather than genuine customer loyalty. Learn why such 'perfect' scores should raise questions, not applause.

title: Rethinking Loyalty: Lessons from Comparing NPS® with Actual Behaviour
excerpt: Discover key lessons on loyalty through an insightful NPS® comparison with real customer actions and behaviours.

title: Revisiting the Apostles Model: Understanding Customer Behaviour in Today's Context
excerpt: Explore the Apostles Model's relevance in understanding modern customer behaviour and enhancing satisfaction.

title: Should All Websites Ditch the Cookie Jar? Rethinking Privacy in a Tracking-Obsessed World
excerpt: In a world obsessed with tracking, should websites abandon cookies? Exploring how privacy-by-design creates better customer experiences and why transparency matters more than data collection.

title: Successful CX Programs Beyond Surveys
excerpt: Build successful CX programs that go beyond surveys. Learn how cross-functional teams, customer intimacy, and employee engagement create sustainable customer experience improvements that drive revenue and customer retention.

title: Surveying for Compliments: The Bias in Customer Feedback
excerpt: Explore how customer feedback surveys can skew perceptions and impact business decisions. Insights from Xperience 360.

title: The Absurdity of Closed-Box-Only Return Policies: A Customer Experience Fail
excerpt: Closed-box-only return policies create poor customer experiences and reduce sales. Discover why restrictive return policies damage customer trust, hurt retail strategy, and fail to protect businesses effectively.

title: The Confusion Between NPS® and Satisfaction: A Missed Opportunity in CX Measurement
excerpt: Explore the differences between NPS® and satisfaction for effective CX strategies and seize the opportunity for improvement.

title: The Critical Role of a Complaints Process in Enhancing Customer Experience
excerpt: Discover how a structured complaints process enhances feedback and drives customer experience improvement.

title: The Death of Customer Trust: When Return Policies Kill the Experience
excerpt: Restrictive 'unopened box only' return policies are killing customer trust and handing competitive advantage to Amazon. Discover why customer-friendly return policies drive long-term business success.

title: The Digital Privacy Paradox: How Cookie Consent Became a Nightmare for Customer Experience
excerpt: Cookie consent banners have become a customer experience nightmare. Discover how GDPR compliance, cookie tracking, and privacy-by-design impact user experience and learn strategies for transparent data privacy that builds customer trust.

title: The Discount Dilemma: Do Promotions Build Loyalty or Just Train Deal-Hunters?
excerpt: Do discounts build customer loyalty or just train customers to wait for the next deal? Explore the psychology of promotions, their impact on brand perception, and discover win-win alternatives that build genuine customer relationships without creating deal-hunting behavior.

title: The Evolution of CES: From Service Saviour to Journey Juggernaut – And Why Your KPIs Need to Play Tag Team
excerpt: Discover how the Customer Effort Score (CES) evolved from a customer service metric to a journey-wide tool for measuring ease. Learn why a tailored multi-KPI strategy combining CES, CSAT, and NPS® delivers deeper customer insights and stronger customer loyalty than any single metric alone.

title: The Hidden Bias in NPS® Surveys: Why Colour-Coding Can Distort Customer Feedback
excerpt: Explore how colour-coding in NPS® surveys distorts customer feedback and affects organisational insights.

title: The Hidden Cost of Outsourcing: How a Single Provider Can Ruin Your Customer Experience
excerpt: Discover how relying on a single provider can negatively impact your online shopping experience and customer satisfaction.

title: The Impact of Ambiguous Survey Questions: Ensuring Clear Data for Effective CX Insights
excerpt: Explore how clear survey design enhances customer experience data accuracy and drives effective insights for better decision-making.

title: The Kano Model: Beyond Product Development Into Customer Experience Excellence
excerpt: Discover why the Kano Model isn't just for product development. Learn how this powerful framework transforms customer experience strategy by categorising features into Must-be, Performance, and Attractive requirements.

title: Think before surveying customers
excerpt: Learn how to effectively gather feedback through surveys and other effective methods to improve customer experience, gaining valuable insights.

title: Unlocking Customer Experience: A Strategic Approach to Business Success
excerpt: Discover strategies to enhance customer experience, boost retention, and leverage insights for effective business growth.

title: Why an NPS® of 95 Is a Red Flag, Not a Trophy
excerpt: An NPS® of 95 sounds impressive, but it's technically dubious and often a sign of a gamed system rather than genuine customer loyalty. Learn why such 'perfect' scores should raise questions, not applause.

title: Why Forcing Survey Responses Destroys Your Data
excerpt: Forcing mandatory survey responses destroys data quality and creates survey fatigue. Learn why allowing optional questions improves response rates, data accuracy, and customer experience in market research and customer feedback collection.
